title: TeleportationWand
description: Ability to teleport with an item!
body: TeleportationWand Thanks to this plugin, your server's players can teleport to any places they have previously set. They are like "warps", but more in the vanilla style. You can change almost all in config. **Teleporter recipe:** ![Teleporter recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a66f65904586d3e4703ee7a0166032909ab0aa76.png) You can change it in config. **Teleporting animation:** ![Teleporting animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f647912244290cd877d66666b215e231243404de.png)
